.. change::
    :tags: bug, orm
    :tickets: 13203

    Fixed issue where using :func:`_orm.joinedload` with
    :meth:`.PropComparator.of_type` targeting a joined-table subclass
    combined with :meth:`.PropComparator.and_` referencing a column on
    that subclass would generate invalid SQL, where the subclass column
    was not adapted to the subquery alias.
